proficiencies.note: Fighters have no formal subclass. Your weapon group focus and feats define your fighting style.

subclasses.label: Arcane School
subclasses.help: Your school of magical study — shapes your curriculum spells, your initial school spell, and the theoretical foundation of your spellcasting. Theses are a separate selection layered on later in your career via class feats.

options.name: Ars Grammatica
options.desc: Runes, wards, and the written word. Curriculum emphasizes Message, Sigil, Dispel Magic, Spellwrack. Initial school spell: Protective Wards.

options.name: Battle Magic
options.desc: The combat wizard. Curriculum focuses on damage and protection: Force Barrage, Fireball, Howling Blizzard. Initial school spell: Force Bolt.

options.name: Civic Wizardry
options.desc: Practical magic for the common citizen — construction, finding lost things, urban utility. Initial school spell: Earthworks.

options.name: Mentalism
options.desc: The mind-mage. Curriculum: Daze, Figment, Sleep, Hallucination, Project Image. Initial school spell: Charming Push.

options.name: Protean Form
options.desc: The polymorpher. Pest Form, Enlarge, Humanoid Form, Monstrosity Form, Metamorphosis. Initial school spell: Scramble Body.

options.name: The Boundary
options.desc: Planar and spirit magic. Grim Tendrils, Summon Undead, Banishment, Massacre. Initial school spell: Fortify Summoning.

options.name: Unified Magical Theory
options.desc: The generalist. No curriculum. Bonus 1st-level wizard class feat AND one extra 1st-rank spell in your spellbook. Drain Bonded Item refreshes per rank instead of per day.

options.name: Elemental School
options.desc: Pick an element at level 1 (air, earth, fire, metal, water, wood). Curriculum spells take that element's trait; initial school spell is themed to your element. Source: Rage of Elements.

subclasses.label: Racket
subclasses.help: How you operate. Your racket shapes your bonus skill, your damage ability for sneak attack, and your starting feel.

options.name: Mastermind
options.desc: Studious manipulator. INT-based; bonus to Society and Diplomacy; sneak attack damage from your wits.

options.name: Ruffian
options.desc: Brutal back-alley enforcer. Wear medium armor and use martial weapons for sneak attack. STR-favored.

options.name: Scoundrel
options.desc: Charming liar. CHA-based; bonus to Deception and Diplomacy; expert of misdirection and feint.

options.name: Thief
options.desc: Classic burglar. Use DEX for melee damage instead of STR. Trained in Thievery as bonus skill.

options.name: Eldritch Trickster
options.desc: Mixes spellcasting and sneak attack. Caster multiclass synergies.

options.name: Avenger
options.desc: Church-trained holy assassin. Sanctified to your deity, Sneak Attack church-defined targets. Source: War of Immortals.

subclasses.label: Doctrine
subclasses.help: Your relationship to your deity. Determines your starting weapon and spell focus.

options.name: Cloistered Cleric
options.desc: Scholar-priest. Faster spellcasting progression (expert by level 11). Trained in your deity's favored weapon plus simple weapons. No armor training increase.

options.name: Warpriest
options.desc: Battle-priest. Medium armor proficiency. Trained in martial weapons. Slower spellcasting (expert by level 13) but tougher in melee.

subclasses.label: Instinct
subclasses.help: The primal force you channel into your rage. Determines damage type, special features, and anathema.

options.name: Animal Instinct
options.desc: Take on bestial fury. Pick an animal aspect (ape, bear, bull, cat, deer, frog, shark, snake, wolf). Unarmed attacks deal 1d10 damage.

options.name: Dragon Instinct
options.desc: Channel a draconic ancestor. Pick a dragon type — your rage damage matches its breath. Eventually gain a draconic breath weapon.

options.name: Fury Instinct
options.desc: Pure unfocused rage. Bonus class feat at level 1 in exchange for no thematic abilities. The most freeform Instinct.

options.name: Giant Instinct
options.desc: Channel titanic forebears. Wield weapons two sizes larger than you. Massive damage at a cost to AC during rage.

options.name: Spirit Instinct
options.desc: Channel ancestor spirits. Your rage adds negative or positive damage and you can disrupt undead.

options.name: Superstition Instinct
options.desc: Anti-magic fury. Bonus to saves against spells while raging; you can't willingly receive magical help.

options.name: Bloodrager
options.desc: Drink supernatural blood to fuel arcane or divine magic. Blood Rage adds persistent bleed damage; the Bloodrager archetype unlocks a CHA-based spell repertoire. Source: War of Immortals.

subclasses.label: Muse
subclasses.help: The source of your inspiration. Determines your composition cantrip and bonus spell list.

options.name: Enigma
options.desc: Scholar of mysteries. INT-favored. Gain Bardic Lore — automatic checks to recall obscure knowledge.

options.name: Maestro
options.desc: Classic inspirer. Composition cantrip Inspire Courage. CHA-favored — the bard everyone thinks of.

options.name: Polymath
options.desc: Versatile gatherer of lore. Gain Versatile Performance — sub Performance for other skills socially. Eclectic spell list.

options.name: Warrior
options.desc: Martial troubadour. Trained in martial weapons. Composition cantrip Lingering Composition stretches inspirations.

options.name: Zoophonia
options.desc: Inspiration from animal voices — birdsong, wolf howls, trumpeting elephants. Zoophonic Communication lets you converse with animals. Source: Howl of the Wild.

subclasses.label: Order
subclasses.help: Your druidic order sets where your power comes from and what it does best. All Remaster orders are full primal casters; the order shapes your initial skill, focus spell, and signature feature.

options.name: Animal Order
options.desc: Bond with beasts. Gain a young animal companion at level 1 and the Heal Animal focus spell. Trained in Athletics. Best for the player who wants a furry battle partner.

options.name: Leaf Order
options.desc: Steward of growing things. Gain a leshy familiar and the Goodberry focus spell. Trained in Diplomacy. The naturalist healer fantasy.

options.name: Storm Order
options.desc: Channel weather and the sky. Gain the Tempest Surge focus spell. Trained in Acrobatics. Reach across the battlefield with lightning and gust.

options.name: Untamed Order
options.desc: Walk as a beast. Gain the Untamed Form focus spell — shapeshift into wild forms early and often. Trained in Nature. The shapeshifter path.

options.name: Flame Order
options.desc: Channel the elemental plane of Fire. Fire-themed focus spells and scaling fire resistance. Source: Rage of Elements.

options.name: Stone Order
options.desc: Channel the elemental plane of Earth. Stone-themed focus spells and defensive bonuses on grounded terrain. Source: Rage of Elements.

options.name: Wave Order
options.desc: Channel the elemental plane of Water. Water-themed focus spells with bonuses in or near water. Source: Rage of Elements.

subclasses.label: Cause
subclasses.help: Your divine calling. Each cause sets your tenets, anathema, and Champion's Reaction.

options.name: Justice
options.desc: Tenets of Good. Retributive Strike when an ally near you is hit. The shining knight.

options.name: Liberation
options.desc: Tenets of Good plus anti-tyranny. Liberating Step frees an ally from a grab or restriction as a reaction.

options.name: Redemption
options.desc: Tenets of Good plus mercy. Glimpse of Redemption makes the attacker choose: enfeebled or resistance-reduced damage.

options.name: Grandeur
options.desc: Tenets of Good as inspiring example. Bring humility to other realms; bolster allies via shining presence.

options.name: Iniquity
options.desc: Tenets of Evil. Dishonorable, dishonest, breaks false hopes of kindness. Chaotic-evil mirror of Justice.

options.name: Obedience
options.desc: Tenets of Evil through control. Enforce proper hierarchies; punish disobedience. Lawful-evil cause.

options.name: Desecration
options.desc: Tenets of Evil through corruption. Defile holy ground, holy creatures, sacred objects. Spread malign influence.

subclasses.label: Hunter's Edge
subclasses.help: How you specialize when hunting prey. Sets your combat-style focus.

options.name: Flurry
options.desc: Multi-attack specialist. MAP −3/−6 instead of −5/−10 against your hunted prey.

options.name: Outwit
options.desc: Tactical specialist. +1 AC against prey AND +2 to Deception, Intimidation, Stealth, Recall Knowledge vs prey.

options.name: Precision
options.desc: Big-hit specialist. First hit on your prey each round deals 1d8 bonus damage (scales with level).

options.name: Vindicator
options.desc: Divine inquisitor. +1 status to spell attack vs prey; learn the Vindicator's Mark warden spell. Source: War of Immortals.

subclasses.label: Style
subclasses.help: How you generate Panache in combat. Each style ties Panache to a different skill.

options.name: Battledancer
options.desc: Performance-fueled. Tumble Through and theatrical actions generate Panache. Trained in Performance.

options.name: Braggart
options.desc: Intimidation-fueled. Demoralize generates Panache. Trained in Intimidation.

options.name: Fencer
options.desc: Acrobatics-fueled. Tumble Through generates Panache. Trained in Acrobatics.

options.name: Gymnast
options.desc: Athletics-fueled. Grapple/Shove/Trip/Disarm generate Panache. Trained in Athletics.

options.name: Wit
options.desc: Diplomacy-fueled. Bon Mot generates Panache. Trained in Diplomacy.

options.name: Rascal
options.desc: Deception-fueled. Feint generates Panache. Trained in Deception.

subclasses.label: Hybrid Study
subclasses.help: Your spell-and-steel combat style. Each Hybrid Study tunes Spellstrike to a different weapon profile.

options.name: Inexorable Iron
options.desc: Two-handed STR melee. Heaviest hits among Magus options.

options.name: Laughing Shadow
options.desc: One-handed DEX duelist with light armor and shadow flavor. Fast and slippery.

options.name: Sparkling Targe
options.desc: Shield-and-spell. Shield Block reactive defense with full Spellstrike access. The most durable Magus.

options.name: Starlit Span
options.desc: Bow-focused Spellstrike. Cast through ranged attacks at full bow range.

options.name: Twisting Tree
options.desc: Two-handed STR/DEX flexibility (quarterstaff iconic). Defensive versatility with damage.

subclasses.label: Conscious Mind
subclasses.help: Your signature spell list and amped-cantrip specialty. The deliberate, intentional half of your psychic power.

options.name: The Distant Grasp
options.desc: Telekinesis. Move objects and creatures through psychic force. Amped cantrips weaponize psychokinetic force.

options.name: The Infinite Eye
options.desc: Divination and perception. See what others can't — distant places, hidden truths, futures.

options.name: The Oscillating Wave
options.desc: Elemental damage alternating between fire and cold each round for variable-resistance bypass.

options.name: The Silent Whisper
options.desc: Telepathic control. Daze, suggestion, mental manipulation as combat tools.

options.name: The Tangible Dream
options.desc: Illusions visible and audible to others. Figment and battlefield misdirection.

options.name: The Unbound Step
options.desc: Spatial movement. Teleportation, phase shifts, slipping past barriers.

subclassSecondary.label: Subconscious Mind
subclassSecondary.help: The deeper layer of your psyche — sets your key ability and thoughtform aesthetic. Both Conscious and Subconscious selections are required at level 1.

options.name: Emotional Acceptance
options.desc: Feelings-driven (CHA). Thoughtforms manifest as emotion — joy as buoyancy, fear as gripping cold. Psyche action: Restore the Mind.

options.name: Gathered Lore
options.desc: Trained mind (INT). Mantra thoughtforms; you draw on collected teaching and study. Psyche action: Recall the Teachings.

options.name: Precise Discipline
options.desc: Calculator mind (INT). Calculation thoughtforms — equations, tessellations, harmonic tones. Psyche action: Calculate Threats.

options.name: Wandering Reverie
options.desc: Daydreamer (CHA). Imagination thoughtforms — surreal, indistinct, fading like dream-sensations. Psyche action: Fade into Daydreams.

subclasses.label: Mystery
subclasses.help: The divine source that contacted you. Each mystery has a curse that escalates as you spend its power.

options.name: Ancestors
options.desc: Bound to ancestral spirits. Curse: spirits possess you, making you clumsy. Trained in Occultism.

options.name: Battle
options.desc: The spirit of warfare. Martial proficiencies unusual for a caster — medium/heavy armor + weapon group. Trained in Athletics.

options.name: Bones
options.desc: Death and undeath. Curse: your body slowly decays. Trained in Medicine.

options.name: Cosmos
options.desc: Celestial bodies and the void. Resistance to physical damage scaling with level. Trained in Nature.

options.name: Flames
options.desc: Sacred and destructive fire. Curse: persistent fire damage at higher levels. Trained in Acrobatics.

options.name: Life
options.desc: Positive energy and healing. Curse: your healing magic sympathetically harms you. Trained in Medicine.

options.name: Lore
options.desc: Knowledge itself. Extra spells in your repertoire — you know more magic than other oracles. Trained in Occultism + a Lore.

options.name: Tempest
options.desc: Storms in wind and water. Add electricity damage to physical air/water spell damage. Trained in Nature.

options.name: Time
options.desc: Past, present, future. Brief precognitive glimpses and minor time-manipulation. Trained in Society. Source: Dark Archive Remastered.

subclasses.label: Patron
subclasses.help: The mysterious entity that grants your magic through your familiar. Determines your spell tradition.

options.name: Faith's Flamekeeper
options.desc: Divine patron — covert angel, aeon, or sinister celestial. Patron skill: Religion.

options.name: The Inscribed One
options.desc: Arcane patron of glyphs and runes — likely a powerful archmage or abandoned artifact. Patron skill: Arcana.

options.name: The Resentment
options.desc: Occult patron of grudges and envy — a hag ousted from coven, lower-rank demon, or quasi-divinity. Patron skill: Occultism.

options.name: Silence in Snow
options.desc: Primal patron of winter — winter hag, ice yai, or spirit of the cold. Patron skill: Nature.

options.name: Spinner of Threads
options.desc: Occult patron of fate and time — norn, herald of Pharasma, or time-spanning entity. Patron skill: Occultism.

options.name: Starless Shadow
options.desc: Occult patron of darkness — creature of the Netherworld or forgotten spirit of twilight. Patron skill: Occultism.

options.name: Wilding Steward
options.desc: Primal patron of wilderness — dryad queen or primeval beast defending nature. Patron skill: Nature.

options.name: Devourer of Decay
options.desc: Primal patron of rot and renewal — arboreal, fungus, or psychopomp. Patron skill: Nature. Source: Howl of the Wild.

options.name: Ripple in the Deep
options.desc: Primal patron of leviathans and the deep — kraken or ancient ocean denizen. Patron skill: Nature. Source: Howl of the Wild.

options.name: Whisper of Wings
options.desc: Primal patron of sky and air. Wings and swirling winds. Patron skill: Nature. Source: Howl of the Wild.

subclasses.label: Bloodline
subclasses.help: The ancestral source of your innate magic. Determines your spell tradition and signature spells.

options.name: Aberrant
options.desc: Something ancient and unknowable speaks to you from beyond the stars. Occult tradition.

options.name: Angelic
options.desc: Celestial heritage or devotion's blessing. Divine tradition.

options.name: Demonic
options.desc: Your ancestor fell victim to abyssal corruption. Divine tradition.

options.name: Diabolic
options.desc: Infernal pact or descent from hellfire. Divine tradition.

options.name: Draconic
options.desc: Dragon blood. Tradition varies by Draconic Exemplar (Arcane / Divine / Occult / Primal).

options.name: Elemental
options.desc: Elemental Influence (air/earth/fire/metal/water/wood) determines damage type. Primal tradition.

options.name: Fey
options.desc: First World whimsy in the family line. Primal tradition.

options.name: Hag
options.desc: A hag's curse or hag/changeling descent. Occult tradition.

options.name: Imperial
options.desc: Mortal ancestor who mastered magic itself — pure arcane bloodline. Arcane tradition.

options.name: Undead
options.desc: Vampire ancestor or other undead in the family tree. Divine tradition.

options.name: Aesir
options.desc: An ancestor touched by an aesir. Divine tradition. Source: Battlecry!

subclasses.label: Research Field
subclasses.help: Your specialty within alchemy. Sets your starting formulas and signature mechanic.

options.name: Bomber
options.desc: Splash-target precision. Throw bombs that deal splash damage only to your primary target.

options.name: Chirurgeon
options.desc: Alchemical healer. Use Crafting in place of Medicine. Versatile vials can heal living creatures.

options.name: Mutagenist
options.desc: Self-experimenter. Drink mutagens for risky temporary transformations — bonuses with drawbacks.

options.name: Toxicologist
options.desc: Poisoner. Apply injury poisons as a single action. Your poison-trait items deal acid to poison-immune enemies.

subclasses.label: Methodology
subclasses.help: Your approach to investigation. Shapes your starting skill and signature action.

options.name: Alchemical Sciences
options.desc: Forensic chemist. Trained in Crafting + Alchemical Crafting feat. Quick Tincture brews short-lived items.

options.name: Empiricism
options.desc: Data-driven detective. Trained in an INT skill + That's Odd feat. Expeditious Inspection: free-action Recall/Seek/Sense Motive.

options.name: Forensic Medicine
options.desc: Murder-scene specialist. Trained in Medicine + Battle Medicine. Heal allies almost every fight.

options.name: Interrogation
options.desc: Truth-extractor. Trained in Diplomacy + No Cause for Alarm. Pointed Question gains Lie-detection bonuses.

subclasses.label: Innovation
subclasses.help: Your signature invention. The thing you'll modify and refine across your career.

options.name: Armor Innovation
options.desc: A powered exoskeleton you wear. Your armor IS your invention.

options.name: Construct Innovation
options.desc: A mechanical companion that fights alongside you.

options.name: Weapon Innovation
options.desc: A one-of-a-kind signature weapon you customize over time.

options.name: Light Mortar Innovation
options.desc: A personal-scale mortar firing explosive shells along arcing trajectories — indirect-fire artillery.

subclasses.label: Way
subclasses.help: Your firearm specialty. Sets your Initial Deed and weapon focus.

options.name: Way of the Drifter
options.desc: Wandering gunhand. Reactive Pistol Whip — use your firearm in melee for a reactive Strike. Trained in Stealth.

options.name: Way of the Pistolero
options.desc: Dueling shootist. Pistolero's Retort — reactive Strike against attackers who crit-fail. Trained in Intimidation.

options.name: Way of the Sniper
options.desc: Long-range specialist. One Shot, One Kill — bonus damage against unaware targets. Trained in Stealth.

options.name: Way of the Spellshot
options.desc: Magical gunslinger. Gain an arcane cantrip you can cast through your firearm. Trained in Arcana.

options.name: Way of the Vanguard
options.desc: Crowd-controller with a long gun. Vanguard's Bravado — Demoralize while reloading. Trained in Intimidation.

subclasses.label: Kinetic Gate
subclasses.help: The elemental plane(s) you channel. Each Gate determines your starting impulses and damage type.

options.name: Air Gate
options.desc: Bludgeoning or electricity. Speed, evasion, mobility, ranged force.

options.name: Earth Gate
options.desc: Bludgeoning or piercing. Durability, terrain manipulation, immovability.

options.name: Fire Gate
options.desc: Fire. Pure damage, area-of-effect, ignition. The blaster element.

options.name: Metal Gate
options.desc: Slashing/piercing or electricity. Weapon-themed manifestations, conductive attacks.

options.name: Water Gate
options.desc: Cold or bludgeoning. Positioning, healing, terrain manipulation.

options.name: Wood Gate
options.desc: Bludgeoning or piercing. Terrain control, healing, restoration.

subclasses.label: First Implement
subclasses.help: The magical object that channels your power. Pick your first implement; later levels add more.

options.name: Amulet
options.desc: Lucky charm. Passive defensive benefits tied to wearing the amulet.

options.name: Bell
options.desc: Sound-shaper. Emotion-affecting auras, sonic disruption, attention-grabbing strikes.

options.name: Chalice
options.desc: Cup of life. Once-per-round sip (temp HP) or drain (heal 3 HP/level, empties for 10 min).

options.name: Lantern
options.desc: Light of revelation. Reveal hidden things, dispel illusions, damage shadow-loving enemies.

options.name: Mirror
options.desc: Misdirection specialist. Duplicates, reflected attacks, perception manipulation.

options.name: Regalia
options.desc: Badge of authority. Social interaction bonuses; command nearby allies.

options.name: Shield
options.desc: Defender's symbol. Enhanced defenses, ally protection, ward effects. Source: Battlecry!

options.name: Tome
options.desc: Keeper of forgotten knowledge. Temporary skill training, knowledge-check bonuses.

options.name: Wand
options.desc: Magic-channeling rod. Spell-like effects channeled through the wand; bonus damage on strikes.

options.name: Weapon
options.desc: Combat focus. One-handed weapon channels energies; weapon serves as fighting tool AND magical focus.

subclasses.label: Eidolon
subclasses.help: Your magical partner. Their nature determines your spell tradition.

options.name: Angel Eidolon
options.desc: Celestial messenger from the angelic host. Divine tradition. Alignment must be good.

options.name: Anger Phantom Eidolon
options.desc: Lost soul bound by undying anger. Occult tradition. Home plane: Ethereal.

options.name: Beast Eidolon
options.desc: Manifestation of nature's life force as a powerful magical beast. Primal tradition.

options.name: Construct Eidolon
options.desc: Mental construct from astral entities. Shape limited only by your imagination. Arcane tradition.

options.name: Demon Eidolon
options.desc: Bound fiend of the Abyss. Divine tradition. Alignment must be chaotic evil.

options.name: Devotion Phantom Eidolon
options.desc: Lost soul bound by duty or devotion. Occult tradition. Home plane: Ethereal.

options.name: Dragon Eidolon
options.desc: Echoed mind of a deceased dragon. Arcane tradition. Includes a Breath Weapon trait.

options.name: Elemental Eidolon
options.desc: Primal elemental matter infused with sapience. Primal tradition. Choose an Elemental Core at level 1.

options.name: Fey Eidolon
options.desc: Being of the First World. Primal tradition. May remember fragments of past lives.

options.name: Plant Eidolon
options.desc: Intelligent plant from the same fragments that become leshys. Primal tradition.

options.name: Psychopomp Eidolon
options.desc: Soul-shepherd ushering the dead. Divine tradition. Alignment must be true neutral.

options.name: Swarm Eidolon
options.desc: Collective of Tiny animals acting in concert with shared consciousness. Primal tradition. Source: Battlecry!

subclasses.label: Body Ikon
subclasses.help: An ikon imbued into your body itself — can't be stolen or disarmed. Pick ONE body ikon, ONE worn ikon, and ONE weapon ikon at level 1.

options.name: Eye-Catching Spot
options.desc: Beauty as weapon. Imbued on the face. −1 circumstance to melee attacks against you. Transcendence: Captivating Charm fascinates a target.

options.name: Gaze Sharp as Steel
options.desc: Eyes that see everything. +1 status to Perception, +2 status to AC vs ranged. Transcendence: A Moment Unending adds precision damage.

options.name: Scar of the Survivor
options.desc: Mark of the unbreakable. Diehard feat + +1 status to Fortitude saves. Transcendence: No Scar but This regains HP.

options.name: Skin Hard as Horn
options.desc: Living armor. Resistance to bludgeoning/slashing/piercing (chosen daily). Transcendence: Crash against Me upgrades resistance and disrupts attackers.

subclassSecondary.label: Worn Ikon
subclassSecondary.help: An ikon worn as gear — a belt, cloak, bracers, sash, or similar. Choose one.

options.name: Bands of Imprisonment
options.desc: Discipline through restraint. +1 status to Will saves, mental resistance. Transcendence: Break Free combines Escape, Stride, and Strike.

options.name: Fetching Bangles
options.desc: Charm magnetism. Aura disrupts enemy retreat. Transcendence: Embrace of Destiny pulls a target adjacent to you.

options.name: Horn of Plenty
options.desc: Blessed vessel. Stores potions/elixirs and produces a temporary elixir of life daily. Transcendence: Feed the Masses transfers to an ally at range.

options.name: Mirrored Aegis
options.desc: Reflective shield. 15-ft aura grants +1 status to AC for you and allies. Transcendence: Raise the Walls layers ethereal shields on you and an ally.

options.name: Pelt of the Beast
options.desc: Wild's protection. Daily-chosen energy resistance (cold/electricity/fire/poison/sonic). Transcendence: Survive the Wilds shares the resistance as aura.

options.name: Skybearer's Belt
options.desc: Strength to lift the heavens. Bonus on Athletics maneuvers against creatures up to two sizes larger. Transcendence: Bear Allies' Burdens carries allies during your Stride.

options.name: Thousand-League Sandals
options.desc: Runner's gift. +10-ft status bonus to Speed. Transcendence: Marathon Dash grants nearby allies a free Stride as a reaction.

options.name: Victor's Wreath
options.desc: Mark of triumph. 15-ft aura grants allies +1 status bonus to attack rolls. Transcendence: One Moment till Glory grants re-saves with bonus.

subclassTertiary.label: Weapon Ikon
subclassTertiary.help: An ikon embedded in your signature weapon. Choose one — its damage type and group constrain the weapon you wield.

options.name: Barrow's Edge
options.desc: Vampiric blade (slashing or piercing melee). +1 spirit/die; +3/die vs creatures below half HP. Transcendence: Drink of my Foes heals half damage dealt.

options.name: Gleaming Blade
options.desc: Radiant cutter (sword/knife group or slashing unarmed). +2 spirit/die. Transcendence: Flowing Spirit Strike merges two attacks into one damage instance.

options.name: Hands of the Wildling
options.desc: Bestial fists (free-hand or unarmed). +1 spirit splash/die (immune to your own). Transcendence: Feral Swing 15-ft cone with Strike damage as spirit.

options.name: Mortal Harvest
options.desc: Reaper's tool (sickle, axe, flail, polearm). 1 persistent spirit/die on hits. Transcendence: Reap the Field strides then strikes a different target.

options.name: Noble Branch
options.desc: Humble staff (staff, bo staff, spear, polearm). +2 spirit/die. Transcendence: Strike, Breathe, Rend adds rending damage equal to weapon dice.

options.name: Shadow Sheath
options.desc: Infinite armory (thrown light weapon). Free-action draws of weapon copies; +2 spirit/die (+3 vs off-guard). Transcendence: Liar's Hidden Blade retries on a missed Strike.

options.name: Starshot
options.desc: Cosmic projectile (ranged weapon). +1 spirit splash/die. Transcendence: Giant-Felling Comet basic-Reflex 5-ft burst within 60 ft.

options.name: Titan's Breaker
options.desc: Mountain-shatterer (club/hammer/axe or bludgeoning unarmed). +2 spirit/die; bypasses Hardness equal to your level. Transcendence: Fracture Mountains crit-scales against constructs.

options.name: Unfailing Bow
options.desc: Guided arrow (ranged weapon). +1 spirit/die, +1d4 spirit/die on crit. Transcendence: Arrow Splits Arrow repeats the prior d20 result.

subclasses.label: Primary Apparition
subclasses.help: The spirit you bind most closely. Each apparition grants distinct skills and spells.

options.name: Crafter in the Vault
options.desc: Forge-spirit. Apparition skills: Architecture/Engineering Lore. Vessel Spell: Traveling Workshop.

options.name: Custodian of Groves and Gardens
options.desc: Peaceful steward. Apparition skills: Farming/Herbalism Lore. Vessel Spell: Garden of Healing.

options.name: Echo of Lost Moments
options.desc: Time-fragment. Apparition skills: Fortune-Telling/Genealogy Lore. Vessel Spell: Store Time.

options.name: Impostor in Hidden Places
options.desc: Whisperer in shadows. Apparition skills: Fortune-Telling/Underworld Lore. Vessel Spell: Discomfiting Whisper.

options.name: Lurker in Devouring Dark
options.desc: Deep-dweller. Apparition skills: Ocean/Sailing Lore. Vessel Spell: Devouring Dark Form.

options.name: Monarch of the Fey Courts
options.desc: Fey royal. Apparition skills: Art/Fey Lore. Vessel Spell: Nymph's Grace.

options.name: Reveler in Lost Glee
options.desc: Dark jester. Apparition skills: Circus/Fortune-Telling Lore. Vessel Spell: Trickster's Mirrors.

options.name: Stalker in Darkened Boughs
options.desc: Forest predator. Apparition skills: Forest/Hunting Lore. Vessel Spell: Darkened Forest Form.

options.name: Steward of Stone and Fire
options.desc: Volcano-keeper. Apparition skills: Mountain/Volcano Lore. Vessel Spell: Earth's Bile.

options.name: Vanguard of Roaring Waters
options.desc: River spirit. Apparition skills: Mountain/River Lore. Vessel Spell: River Carving Mountains.

options.name: Witness to Ancient Battles
options.desc: Battlefield spirit. Apparition skills: Battlegrounds/Heraldry Lore. Vessel Spell: Embodiment of Battle.

subclassSecondary.label: Animistic Practice
subclassSecondary.help: How your power grows and develops alongside your apparition bond. Required at level 1; you gain its first invocation now and additional invocations at levels 9 and 17.

options.name: Liturgist
options.desc: Draw forth your apparitions through song and dance — performances of your own creation or rites of your religion. First invocation: Song of Invocation. Source: War of Immortals.

options.name: Medium
options.desc: Conduit for spiritual energy; associate freely with a wide array of apparitions rather than bonding deeply with one. First invocation: Invocation of Unity. Source: War of Immortals.

options.name: Seer
options.desc: Sensitive to the presence and influence of spirits and undead. Detect lingering spirits and gain defense against them. Source: War of Immortals.

options.name: Shaman
options.desc: Form close bonds that let apparitions take material form and directly affect the physical world. First invocation: Invocation of Embodiment. Source: War of Immortals.
